title: JSON deny hook (exit 0 + permissionDecision=deny) beats allow Write(*) -> DENIED; reason string is fed back to the model

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P9-hooks-vs-permission/c-json-deny-beats-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool call was blocked with error `P9_HOOK_JSON_DENY`.

hypothesis: 『hook で締める』JSON 経路: exit 0 + hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision=deny も allow Write(*) に勝つ。b(exit 2)とは経路が別 — exit 2 は「規則評価より前に止める」blocking error、JSON deny は hook の判断として返る(hooks docs の実装例はこちらの形が一般的)。permissionDecisionReason(P9_HOOK_JSON_DENY)がモデルに返る。b と対で「締める2経路はどちらも allow を越える」が埋まる。
